metadata.description: Rory Sutherland's psycho-logic for marketing, as Claude skills.

plugins.name: alchemy-marketing
plugins.description: 7 skills that apply Rory Sutherland's psycho-logic to marketing and product problems: psycho-logic (the router — solve the perception, not the metric), a region/culture research layer — cultural-context (how a market reads a signal) and market-recon (live, sourced fieldwork on the target market) — and four moves: reframing (change the meaning before the substance), costly-signaling (why expensive/wasteful/honest signals build trust), counterintuitive-tests (invert the obvious and validate cheaply), and experience-design (fix the felt moment, not the number).
